final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or negedge rst) begin
    begin end  // redundant
    if (!rst) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (en) begin
        if (count == 4'b1111) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
